headline: Peruvian Army Selects Beechcraft King Air 360C for Multi-Mission Operation
summary: SANTIAGO, Chile, April 07, 2026--King Air 360C strengthens Peruvian Army’s ability to deliver emergency response and life-saving aid to remote regions.

headline: Cessna SkyCourier Strengthens Mission Versatility With New In‑Flight Operable Door Option
